title: Thangigagi
desc: Veerabhadra who loves his sister very much gets her married to a nice man. But when Veerabhadra's close friend is killed, he decides to wipe out anti-social elements in the city.

title: Neelambari
desc: Vinod and his TV channel crew arrive in a village for a crucial assignment. A series of spooky events is set in motion after they interview a mysterious woman who lives there.

title: Tagaru Palya
desc: After a villager secures a marriage alliance with a city boy for his only daughter, he prepares to offer a sacrifice to the gods. However, things go awry during the ceremony.

title: 1st Rank Raju
desc: Raju, a focused engineering student with little interest beyond studies, is pushed into real-world challenges that reshape his perspective on success and personal growth.

title: Ondagona Baa
desc: Raghu comes to his paternal village to attend his grandfather's diamond jubilee function. He finds out that due to his uncle, his family was separated, and tries to fix things.
